reviews.name: 코코
reviews.content:
발사탕이 나쁜걸 알지만 끊을 수 없는 코코는 넥카라가 필수적으로 필요한 강지예요!
그래서 시중의 넥카라를 거의 30개 정도 사용해봤는데 끈고정이 잘 안되는 경우도 많고, 솔직히 하루종일 착용하는건데 디자인을 무시 못하겠더라구요... 화이트톤 인테리어에 형광색은 쫌^^;;
ssfw 넥카라는 일단 디자인이 압도적으로!!!! 마음에 들고, 인테리아 착붙 감성충만❤️❤️
거기에 목둘레 조정하는 끈이 이리저리 움직이지 않게 고정되어 있어서 진짜 너무 좋아요!!! 코코두 안빼구 편안히 잘써서 너무 만족스럽게 사용하고 있답니다~~
그리고 엄청 가벼워서 넥카라 끼고도 비숑타임 열시미 즐기고 있어요~~ 발사탕으로 괴로운 강아지들 모두 ssfw 넥카라 사용해보길!! 별 오천개!!!!!!! 두고 갑니당❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: I know lick granulomas are bad, but Coco is a dog that absolutely needs a cone! So I've tried almost 30 cones from different brands, but a lot of them don't secure the straps well, and honestly, since she wears it all day, I can't ignore the design... neon colors don't really go with my white-toned interior ^^;; SSFW's cone design is just overwhelmingly!!!! perfect, and it fits so well with my interior aesthetic ❤️❤️ Plus, the strap for adjusting the neck circumference stays fixed so it doesn't move around—it's seriously so good!!! Coco wears it without taking it off and is so comfortable, so I'm super satisfied~~ And it's incredibly lightweight, so even with the cone on, Coco is enjoying her zoomies~~ I really recommend all dogs suffering from lick granulomas try SSFW cones!! Five stars!!!!!!! That's my honest review ❤️❤️

reviews.name: 꼬미
reviews.content:
발사탕 마스터 강쥐인 꼬미는 넥카라 필수견이이에요
발사탕 뿐만 아니라 스트레스를 받으면 털을 입으로 뜯어내서 거의 매일 착용이 필요해요

기존에 사용하던 넥카라는 얇고 잘 꺾여서 어떻게든 또 뜯고 발사탕을 하는 상황이 발생 ㅠㅠ
꼬미는 8.2kg 강쥐로 평소에 XL 입는 편이고 똑같이 XL 착용 해줬어요

에쎕떱 클라우드 넥카라는 도톰한데 가벼워서 목에 무리도 없고
꺾이지도 않아서 계속 지켜보지 않아도 되어서 저도 편해요

무엇보다 베개같은지 머리 대고 잘자요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 귀여움.
reviews.content_en: Komi is a lick granuloma master pup and absolutely needs a cone. Not only does she have lick granulomas, but she chews out her fur when stressed, so she needs to wear one almost every day. The cone she used before was thin and would bend easily, so no matter what, she'd still manage to chew and have lick granuloma episodes ㅠㅠ Komi is an 8.2kg dog and usually wears XL, so I got her the same size in XL. The AESOP cloud cone is thick yet lightweight, so there's no strain on her neck, and it doesn't bend, so I don't have to keep watching her constantly—which makes my life easier too. Most importantly, she sleeps with her head on it like it's a pillow ㅋㅋㅋㅋ So cute.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
안녕하세요 ssfw 클라우드 넥카라 체험단에 당첨되어 
리뷰를 쓰게 되었어요 
망고는 3개월생 아기 강아지인데요 
6차 접종까지 마치고나면 중성화 수술을 앞두고 있어요
병원에서 씌워주는 딱딱한 플라스틱 넥카라는 너무 답답 할꺼같아 
안그래도 넥카라 제품을 알아보던 중 좋은 기회가 되어 
에셉떱 넥카라 제품을 써보게 되었습니다

일단 처음 제품을 받아보고 든 생각은
디자인이 너무 이쁘다! 였어요
ssfw 강아지 의류도 색감과 디자인이 세련되고 예뿌다고 생각했었는데 넥카라도 역시나 네요👍
무게도 가벼워서 장시간 착용해도 목에 무리가 가지 않을꺼같아요
패브릭 제품은 처음 개봉하면 화학적인 냄새가 날때도 있는데
이 제품은 나무에서 추출한 식물유래 성분의 패브릭이라 그런지
냄새도 전혀 안나서 세탁없이 바로 착용했답니다.

1.2키로 3개월 말티즈 망고가 착용한 사이즈는 s사이즈 입니다
목둘레 사이즈 조절 가능해서 몸집 작은 지금도 잘 맞구요 성견이 되어서도 쭉~사용 가능할꺼같아요 

좋은소재로 예쁘게 만든 SSFW 클라우드 넥카라!
중성화 앞두고 있는 아기강아지들 첫번째 넥카라로 강력 추전해요❤️
reviews.content_en: Hello! I was selected for the SSFW cloud cone review program and got the chance to write this review. Mango is a 3-month-old puppy, and after completing her 6th vaccination, she has spaying surgery coming up. The hard plastic cone the vet uses seemed like it would be really uncomfortable, so while I was already looking into cone products, this was a great opportunity to try the AESOP cone. When I first received the product, my immediate thought was: the design is so pretty! I already thought SSFW's dog clothing had refined and beautiful colors and designs, and the cone is no exception 👍 It's lightweight too, so it shouldn't put strain on her neck even with long-term wear. Fabric products sometimes have a chemical smell when you first open them, but this one is made from plant-derived components extracted from wood, so there's no smell at all—I just wore it right away without washing. Mango is a 1.2kg, 3-month-old Maltese, and the size S fits her perfectly. Since the neck circumference is adjustable, it fits her small frame now and will be usable as she grows into an adult dog too. SSFW cloud cone made with quality materials and beautiful design! I highly recommend it as the first cone for puppies preparing for spaying ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
*바잇미 체험단으로 선발되어 제품을 제공받아 사용한뒤 솔직하게 작성하는 후기입니다*

어릴 때 귀를 자주 긁던 우리 강아지는 한동안 병원에서 받은 플라스틱 넥카라를 했어요. 하지만 딱딱하고 무거운 넥카라는 맨다리에 자꾸 긁히고, 편하게 눕지도 못해 큰 스트레스였죠. 그때의 불편한 기억 때문인지 이후로는 넥카라 착용을 극도로 싫어해 되도록이면 피하고 있었는데, 최근 들어 다시 귀를 자주 긁기 시작해 걱정이 많았어요.

그러던 중 SSFW의 클라우드 넥카라를 알게 되었고, 기대 반 걱정 반으로 착용해보았는데, 놀라울 정도로 거부감 없이 착용하더라고요. 구름처럼 푹신한 쿠션감 덕분인지 착용한 채로 간식도 잘 먹고, 평소처럼 누워서 잘 쉬는 모습에 정말 만족스러웠습니다.

제품의 전체적인 마감과 소재도 매우 부드럽고, 통기성이 좋아 더운 날에도 눈곱이 덜 끼고 위생적으로 사용할 수 있었어요. 무엇보다 스트링 부분에 발이 걸리지 않도록 홀더 디테일이 추가된 점이 인상적이었습니다. 예민하거나 피부가 약한 아이들에게 특히 추천하고 싶은 넥카라입니다.

사이즈도 XS부터 XL까지 다양하게 나와 체형에 맞게 선택할 수 있고, 색상도 블루와 베이지 중 고를 수 있어 선택의 폭이 넓은것도 장점같아요. 저희 강아지처럼 넥카라 착용에 예민한 아이도 편하게 착용할 수 있었던 제품이라, 넥카라에 대한 걱정이 있는 보호자분들께 꼭 추천드리고 싶습니다.
reviews.content_en: *I was selected as a BITE ME tester and am writing this review honestly after using the provided product.* When my dog was young, she frequently scratched her ears, so she wore a plastic cone from the vet for a while. But the hard, heavy cone would scratch her legs and prevent her from lying down comfortably, causing her a lot of stress. Because of those uncomfortable memories, she became extremely reluctant to wear cones and we've been trying to avoid them. But recently, she started scratching her ears frequently again, which worried me a lot. Then I learned about SSFW's cloud cone and decided to try it with both hope and concern—and I was amazed at how readily she accepted it without any resistance. Thanks to the soft, cloud-like cushioning, she eats treats comfortably while wearing it and rests and sleeps normally, which really satisfied me. The overall finish and materials of the product are very soft, and the breathability is great, so even on hot days there's less discharge and it's hygienic to use. Most importantly, I was impressed by the holder detail that prevents the paw from getting caught in the string. It's a cone I'd especially recommend for sensitive or delicate-skinned dogs. It comes in various sizes from XS to XL so you can choose based on your dog's size, and you can pick between blue and beige, which gives you a nice range of options. Since my dog, like many others, is sensitive about wearing cones but was able to wear this comfortably, I really want to recommend it to any pet parents who worry about cone-wearing. 🐶

reviews.name: 쉼****
reviews.content:
SSFW 클라우드 넥카라 블루 M 사이즈를 선택했어요!
가을이는 3kg 인데 충분히 목에는 S도 들어가긴 하지만 고얌미마냥 이리저리 지름 길이가 짧아서 그런지 사타구니랑 핥더라구여 ㅠ.ㅠ 그래서 선택한 M사이즈!! 무리 없이 잘 맞고 게다가 무게도 가볍고 소재도 완전 부들부들 가을이가 벗겨 놓으니 쿠션으로 착각 해서 올라갈만큼 뽀송뽀송 합니다! 🐶🤍🩵

목 조이는 끈도 타사 제품들 처럼 달랑달랑 거리지 않아서 너무 좋고 세심하게 디자인을 한 티가 나 아주 만족해요!

게다가 예쁜 블루와 화이트 조합이라니,, 넥카라가 이렇게 예뻐도 될 일인가요? 더스트 백까지 완전 칭찬해요!!! 

디자인!! 무게!! 활용도!! 모두 별 다섯개 드립니다 🙆🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en: I chose the SSFW cloud cone in blue, size M! Autumn is 3kg, and while S would technically fit around her neck, it's a bit short in circumference, so she was licking her inner thighs ㅠ.ㅠ So I went with M size!! It fits perfectly with no issues, plus it's lightweight and the material is so soft. When Autumn took it off, she mistook it for a cushion because it's so fluffy and tried to jump on it! 🐶🤍🩵 The neck strap also doesn't dangle around like other brands' products, so I'm really happy, and you can tell the design was done carefully. I'm very satisfied! And with such a pretty blue and white combination... can a cone even be this pretty? I totally praise the dust bag too!!! Design!! Weight!! Functionality!! All of it gets five stars from me 🙆🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
안녕하세요 구름맘입니다 🥰
구름이가 #제품제공 #체험단이 되어서 후기를 작성하려고 합니다 !

구름이는 평고 발사탕을 자주 하는편이여서 넥카라를 찾아보고있는중이였습니다 !
딱딱한 플라스틱 보다는 쿠션감이 있는게 좋을거같다고 생각하였습니다 !

 클라우드 넥카라가 딱 ! 제가 생각했던 넥카라였어요 !

귀여운 디자인과 구름이가 불편하지않는 쿠션감이 어느정도 있는 넥카라와 
구름이 목이 얇기 때문에 줄일수있는것도 너무 큰 장점이였습니다 !

아직 10개월인 구름이여서 넥카라 사이즈를 어떤거를 사야할지 고민이였는데 !
클라우드 넥카라는 줄일수있게 만들어주셔서 너무너무 잘 사용할거같습니다 ^^
예쁘게 잘 사용하겠습니다 !클라우드 넥카라 추천 🥰
구름이 몸무게는 2.7kg이고 평소 사이즈는 s~m사이 입니다 참고 부탁드려요~~


#바잇미 #바잇미체험단 #SSFW #클라우드넥카라 #SSFW넥카라 #강아지넥카라 #고양이넥카라 #강아지넥카라추천 #강아지발사탕
reviews.content_en:
Hi, I'm Gureum's mom! 🥰
I'm writing a review as Gureum became a #productprovided #reviewunit!

Gureum tends to lick her paws frequently, so I was looking for a cone collar! I thought a cushioned one would be better than hard plastic.

The Cloud Cone Collar was exactly what I had in mind!

With its cute design and the cushioned feel that doesn't make Gureum uncomfortable, plus the fact that it's adjustable since Gureum has a thin neck - these were such huge advantages!

Since Gureum is only 10 months old, I was worried about which size to get, but the Cloud Cone Collar is adjustable so I think we'll use it so well! 🙂 We'll use it nicely! Highly recommend the Cloud Cone Collar 🥰
For reference, Gureum weighs 2.7kg and usually wears S~M sizes~~

#BITE ME #BITE ME Review Unit #SSFW #Cloud Cone Collar #SSFW Cone Collar #Dog Cone Collar #Cat Cone Collar #Dog Cone Collar Recommendation #Dog Paw Licking

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
둘째가 이제 5개월 되가는데, 중성화할 때 꼭 필요한게 넥카라라 첫 넥카라는 ssfw 에쎕뗍 넥카라로 도전했습니당!
플라스틱 넥카라는 정말 불편하고 무게도 꽤 나가잖아요!
에쎕뗍 넥카라는 우선 디자인이 너무 귀여워요..👼🏻 
블루컬러도 넘 예뻐서 고민했는데 결국 베이지..

그리고 소재도 좋고 무엇보다 가벼워서 아이가 크게 불편해하진 않더라구요! 넥카라는 그래도 장시간 착용하는거니 무게가 중요한데 가벼워서 정말 좋은 것 같아요! 아직 더 써봐야 알겠지만 
디자인, 소재, 합격입니다!

2.7키로 다리짧은 포메 첫째한테는
작더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 다리짧구 2키로 이하가 딱 s인것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
My second one is almost 5 months now, and a cone collar is a must-have for spaying, so I tried SSFW's AESOP cone collar for the first time!
Plastic cone collars are really uncomfortable and pretty heavy, you know?
The AESOP cone collar has such a cute design..👼🏻
I was torn between the blue color too since it's so pretty, but I ended up going with beige..

And the material is great, but most importantly it's so light that my pup doesn't seem too bothered by it! Since cone collars are worn for long periods, weight is really important, and this being light is so perfect! I'll know more after using it longer, but design, material - it passes!

For my first pup, a 2.7kg short-legged Pomeranian, it was too big lol. Seems like S is perfect for under 2kg with short legs!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 체험단으로 제품을 무상으로 제공받고 작성하는 솔직후기입니다 :)

보리는 이제 갓 1살된 1.8kg로 작은 아이라 보리에게 맞는 넥카라 찾는게 어려웠어요.

전에 중성화 할때 산 넥카라는 보리에게 크고 무거워서 보리가 불편해 했었는데, ssfw 넥카라는 보리같이 초소형견에게 딱 알맞은 넥카라가 있더라고요 !!
사이즈는 s로 구매했습니당!!

크기가 작은건 물론이고 너무 가벼워서 보리가 쓰고 있는데도 활발하게 잘 다니고 베개처럼 베고 잘 자더라고요 :)

그리고 제일 맘에 들었던 포인투는,, 디자인이 너무나 예쁘다는 점이에요🤍🤍
reviews.content_en:
This is an honest review written after receiving the product for free as a BITE ME review unit :)

Bori just turned 1 year old at 1.8kg, so it was hard to find a cone collar that fit such a small pup.

The cone collar I bought before for spaying was too big and heavy for Bori, and she was uncomfortable. But with the SSFW cone collar, there's a size that's perfectly fitted for tiny dogs like Bori!!
I purchased size S!

Not only is it small-sized, but it's so light that Bori is very active even while wearing it and sleeps well resting on it like a pillow :)

And the best part that I loved was how beautiful the design is 🤍🤍

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
4.2키로 목둘레 25cm 말티즈 m사이즈 착용했습니다!
저희강아지는 M사이즈도 괜찮지만 털때뭉에 L사이즈도 괜찮을것같아요
일단 다른넥카라들 착용후 엎드렸을때 목이 약간 불편해보이고 숨쉴때 콧소리?같은게 낫었는데 에쎕떱 넥카라 착용하고 엎드려서 숨 쉴때는 전혀 소리가 안나더라구요 그만큼 목도, 숨쉬는것도 편해보이는게 바로 느껴졌습니다! 
그리고 끈조절 디테일이 최고에요.. 
항상 걱정됬던 부분인데 흠잡을곳 없이 너무 맘에들어서 L사이즈도 하나더 구매할까 고민되네요!! 재질도 부들부들 순면 쵝오!
reviews.content_en:
4.2kg, 25cm neck circumference Maltese wearing M size!
My dog is fine with M size, but L size might work too when shedding season hits.
First of all, after wearing other cone collars, my pup seemed uncomfortable around the neck when lying down and made a snoring sound when breathing. But with the AESOP cone collar, when lying down and breathing, there's no sound at all! You can immediately feel how much more comfortable the neck and breathing are!
And the strap adjustment detail is top-notch..
This was always a worry of mine, but I love it so much with no complaints that I'm thinking about buying an L size too!! The material is so soft and pure cotton - the best!

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content:
꼬봉이는 5.3키로 꼬똥아가에요 평상시 옷이나 케이프 L사이즈 착용해서 넥카라도 L로 했는데 사이즈 딱이에유 ㅋㅋ💛

강아지를 키우다 보면 넥타라를 할 일이 종종 있는데 기존 사용 하던거는 너무 빳빳하고 사이즈가 어정쩡해 아이가 밥 먹을때나 물 먹을때 불편해 하고 넥카라만 하면 얼음이였는데 에쎕떱 넥카라 쓰고는 날라댕겨요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 🤣 

이제 에쎕떱 넥카라 계속 쓰려고 합니다:) 

넥카라 쓸 일이 없으면 가장 좋겠지만 어차피 써야 한다면 가볍고 보들보들한데 귀엽기까지한 ssfw 넥카라 강추추에요
칭구들아 꼬봉이랑 커플 넥카라 하쟈 💛
reviews.content_en:
Kkoboong is a 5.3kg Coton de Tuléar and usually wears L size for clothes and capes, so I got L for the cone collar too and it fits perfectly lol 💛

When you have a dog, you often need a cone collar, but the one I used before was so stiff and the size was awkward, so my pup was uncomfortable eating or drinking, and she'd be frozen with just the cone collar on. But with the AESOP cone collar, she's running around like crazy lol 🤣

I'm planning to keep using the AESOP cone collar now :)

It would be best if there was no need for a cone collar at all, but if you have to use one anyway, I highly recommend the light, soft, and cute SSFW cone collar!
Friends, let's get matching cone collars with Kkoboong! 💛

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지는 중성화, 송곳이발치, 탈장수술때마다 매번 병원에서 주는 플라스틱 넥카라만 사용했었는데요
할때마다 괴로워하고 빼려고버둥거리고 그랬었어요😿
얼른 회복하는데에 넥카라가 너무 중요하지만 딱딱한 플라스틱 넥카라때문에 물도 밥도 잘 못먹었는데

SSFW클라우드 넥카라를 받아보고 너무 만족합니다!

정성스럽게 더스트백에 쌓여져서 와서 개봉하자마자 사용할때 찝찝함이 없고
원단은 말해뭐해! 화이바솜을 채워넣어 폭신하고 혹시나 더울수도 있겠다 했지만 냉감이 느껴지는 시원한 소재로 어느 계절에나 다 사용할수 있을것 같아요!
혹시나 무거워하면 어쩌지 했지만 집에서 재보니 180g이라는 가벼운 무게로 걱정도 없어졌답니다

얼굴쪽으로 뻗어있는 넥카라가 아니라서 밥먹을때 물먹을때도 수월하게 먹을수있다는게 너무 좋았어요!
충분히 목아래가 가려져서 발사탕걱정도 없었어요
중간중간 클라우드 넥카라가 편한지 베게처럼 베고 엎드려있는데 귀여움과 편안함은 덤입니다👍

색상과 디자인도 클라우드 라는 이름이 맞게 몽글몽글 부드러운 모양이라 너무 이쁜거있죠🩶
reviews.content_en:
Our dog has had to wear plastic cone collars from the vet every time for spaying, canine tooth extraction, and hernia surgery. Each time, she'd struggle and try to take it off 😿 While the cone is so important for quick recovery, the hard plastic cone made it difficult for her to eat and drink properly.

I'm so satisfied since we got the SSFW Cloud Neck Collar!

It arrived carefully packaged in a dust bag, and there's no discomfort right when you open and use it. The fabric is amazing! It's packed with fluffy fiber foam, and I was worried it might be hot, but it has a cooling feel, so it seems like you can use it in any season!

I was concerned it might be heavy, but when I weighed it at home, it's only 180g—such a light weight that all my worries disappeared.

Since the collar doesn't extend toward the face, she can eat and drink so much more easily—I absolutely love that! The neck area is sufficiently covered so there's no worry about licking her paws. In between, she even uses the Cloud collar like a pillow and lies down on it—plus the cuteness and comfort are a bonus 👍

The color and design match the "Cloud" name perfectly with that soft, fluffy shape, and it's just so pretty 🩶

reviews.name: 여름
reviews.content:
발사탕도 자주 하고 본인의 몸을 종종 깨물어서 상처를 내기도 하는 강쥐라서 넥카라를 자주 착용하는 강아지입니다..ㅜㅜ  넥카라는 보통 예민한 순간 (많이 긁는다거나 아프거나.. 등등)에 자주 사용하게 되는데, 에쎕떱 클라우드 넥카라는 가볍고 폭신하고 부드러워서 혹시나 불편할까 하는 걱정을 덜 수 있어요!

몸무게는 2.8kg에 옷도 m 사이즈를 주로 착용해서 넥카라도 동일하게 m 사이즈 착용했습니다! 
우선 엎드려도 저렇게 발이 조금 보이는 정도라서 발사탕 절대 불가할 것 같아 기능적으로 마음에 들어요! 폭신해서 넥카라 착용해도 불편함 없이 잠도 잘 자고(잘 때는 오히려 편해 보임) 잘 돌아다니고 밥도 잘 먹어서 혹시나 불편해 할까 하는 걱정도 덜 수 있고,  말랑포근폭신한 디자인도 너무 마음에 들어요...♡
reviews.content_en:
My pup is one that frequently licks her paws and sometimes bites her own body, causing wounds, so she wears a cone collar often 😭 Cone collars are usually worn during sensitive times (excessive scratching, pain, etc.), but the SSFW Cloud Neck Collar is so light, fluffy, and soft that I can worry less about it being uncomfortable!

She weighs 2.8kg and usually wears a medium size in clothing, so I got the medium size collar as well! First of all, even when she lies down, you can only barely see her paws, so it seems absolutely impossible for her to lick them—I'm really happy with the functionality! It's so fluffy that she's comfortable wearing it, sleeps well (actually seems more comfortable when sleeping), moves around well, and eats well, so I don't have to worry about her being uncomfortable. Plus, the soft, cozy, fluffy design is just so lovely ♡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
다래끼를 달고 살아 넥카라와 아주 친하게 지내는 몸무게 2.47kg 턱 밑부터 발끝까지 길이가 15~18cm 정도 되는 포메입니다(다리길이는 10cm) 평소 넥카라를 베개처럼 넘 편하게 잘 사용하는 아이인데 이것도 잘 사용합니다 ◡̈ 
다리가 8센치정도 보이는 s, 5센치정도 보이는 m 중에 고민하다가 집에 s사이즈와 흡사한 사이즈가 있어서 좀 더 큰걸로 구매해봤어요 조금 큰 느낌은 있는데 확실히 커버는 잘 될 것 같아요 대신 고개를 좀 숙인다거나 하면 바닥에 닿이고 계단 오르내릴 때 걸릴까 살짝 신경이 쓰이긴 해요 제 개인 취향은 사이즈가 걸쳐지는 강아지의 경우 작은 사이즈가 나을 것 같은데 취향 차이일 것 같아요-!
디자인인 꽃모양으로 원단도 넘 세련되고 예쁜 것 같아요 특히 목 조절 스트랩끈을 고정할 수 있다는 점이 넘 아이디어 상품이네요 저 끈을 물고 가지고 노는 경우가 있었거든요 굿굿! 
넥카라에 빨간 국물 튀었는데 퐁퐁으로 지우니 깔끔하게 잘 지워졌어요
reviews.content_en:
I have a 2.47kg Pomeranian who lives with eye styes and is very familiar with cone collars—from chin to paw tips she's about 15-18cm (leg length is 10cm). She usually finds the cone collar so comfortable that she uses it like a pillow, and she uses this one well too ◡̈ I was torn between size S (where about 8cm of leg shows) and size M (where about 5cm shows), but since I had something similar to the S size at home, I bought a bigger one. It feels a bit large, but it definitely covers well. I do feel a little concerned that it might touch the floor when she lowers her head or when she goes up and down stairs. My personal preference would be that for dogs who are between sizes, a smaller size would be better, but it might just be personal preference~!

The flower-shaped design has really refined and pretty fabric. Especially the fact that you can secure the neck adjustment strap is such a clever product idea—because she used to bite and play with that strap. Great! Some red sauce splashed on the collar, but it wiped right off with Fon Fon cleanser.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 출시되자마자 구매해서 잘 사용하다가 너무 망가져서 새로 샀어요! 강아지가 편안하게 사용하는 것 같아서 저도 만족스럽긴한데 내구성이 좀 아쉬워요. 제가 쓰던 초기 상품은 박음질되어 모양이 잡혀있는 모든 부분에 다 구멍이 생겼어요ㅜㅜ 근데 이게 첫 세탁이후 거의 일괄적으로 생기기 시작한거라 튼튼하지않게 느껴졌습니다. 그 외 디자인이나 기능은 만족해요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it right when it launched and used it well, but it got so damaged I had to buy a new one! My dog seems comfortable using it and I'm satisfied with that, but I wish the durability was better. The early product I was using developed holes in every spot where the stitching created the shape 😭 Since this started happening almost universally right after the first wash, it didn't feel very sturdy. Other than that, I'm satisfied with the design and functionality!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: SSFW 상품들은 제 스타일이라 넥카라 나온다고 했을 때 기대하고 있었어요 역시 취향저격이네요 넥카라가 이렇게 이뻐도 되는가요? 이쁘고 가벼워요👍 알러지가 심한 아이라 계절 바뀌는 시기는 종종 넥카라를 사용해서 집에 넥카라 종류만 다양하게 3-4개 있는데 제일 가볍고 편안하게 사용 할 거 같아요 특히 넥카라 주문할 때 늘 사이즈 결정이 제일 힘들었는데 이번에 사이즈 고르는 방법을 확실하게 배웠어요 기존에 타 제품 넥카라는 몸무게로 사이즈 결정했더니 너무 길어서 아기가 계단으로 내려올 때 넥카라가 발에 치여 넘어질까봐 아슬아슬 해 보였는데 ssfw 넥카라는 문제없어요
reviews.content_en: I've been a fan of SSFW products, so when they said a cone collar was coming out, I was looking forward to it. And it's definitely my style! Can a cone collar really be this pretty? It's pretty and lightweight 👍 My pup has severe allergies, so when seasons change, I often use a cone collar—I have 3-4 different types at home—and this one seems like it'll be the lightest and most comfortable to use. Especially, choosing the right size has always been the hardest part when ordering a cone collar, but this time I learned how to pick the size properly. With my previous cone collar from another brand, I chose the size based on weight and it was too long, so it looked risky when my baby came down the stairs with the collar catching her paws. The SSFW collar has no problems at all.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
요즘 저희집 강아지가 발사탕 횟수도 많아지고 미용후 몸이 간지로운지 이빨로 앙앙 무는 행동들이 보이기 시작했어요.
그래서 마침 넥카라를 찾고 있었는데 이전에 중성화 수술때 사욘하던 플라스틱 넥카라는 불편해하더라구요…
장시간 착용해야하니 강아지에게 편한 제품을 사주고 싶더라구요

근데 마침 제가 이동가방 예뻐서 눈 여겨 보고 있던 에쌥떱에서 이렇게 이쁘고 편한 넥카라가 출시되었더라구요?!
그래서 체험단을 해봤는데 강아지에게 착용해주기도 편하고 강아지도 적응하니 이전 플라스틱 넥카라보다 편해보이더라구용

그리고 시야방해 안되는게 젤 좋았어요!

잘쓰겠습니다🩵
reviews.content_en:
Lately, my dog has been licking her paws more often, and after grooming she seems itchy because she's been biting at herself with her teeth.
So I was looking for a cone collar, but the plastic cone from her spaying surgery was really uncomfortable for her...
Since she needs to wear it for long periods, I wanted to get her something more comfortable.

Then I noticed this pretty cone collar was just released by ESSAP, the brand whose carrier bag I've been eyeing! 😍
So I tried it as a tester, and it's convenient to put on her, she adapts well to it, and it seems much more comfortable than the old plastic cone.

And the best part is it doesn't obstruct her vision!

Will use it well 🩵

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
비숑 3.1kg 등 28cm M사이즈 
발사탕을 많이 해서 넥카라만 5개있는데 
엄청 맘에 든건 없었어요..ㅠㅠ 근데 SSFW 클라우드 넥카라는 너무 맘에 드네요 !! 

또 목둘레 조절하는 끈도 다른 넥카라들은 다리가 짧아서 바닥에 질질 끌고다니는데 클라우드 넥카라는 조절 끈 고정이 되어있어서 너무 행복해요..🤩 

이렇게 완벽하고 좋은 넥카라 만들어주셔서 감사해요~!~!!~~
reviews.content_en:
Bichon 3.1kg, back length 28cm, M size
My pup licks her paws a lot so I have 5 cone collars, but I wasn't really happy with any of them..ㅠㅠ But this SSFW Cloud cone collar is amazing!!

Also, the strap for adjusting the neck opening—with other cone collars the straps are too short so they drag on the ground, but the Cloud cone collar has a fixed strap that doesn't budge, so I'm super happy..🤩

Thank you so much for making such a perfect and wonderful cone collar~!~!!~~

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
울애기 중성화수술후 씌우려고 준비했어요
그외에도 하나 구비해놓음 쓸일이 여러번 있겠죠
두컬러 다 은은하고 예뻐서 고민됐지만
블루가 땡겨서 구매했는데 너무 예뻐요
2키로 비숑 여아인데 s 잘맞아요
넥카라한 울애기도 너무 귀엽네요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I got this ready for my baby's spaying surgery.
It's good to have an extra one on hand in case we need it again.
Both colors are subtle and pretty so I was torn, but I went with the blue because it called to me—and it's so cute!
My 2kg Bichon girl fits perfectly in size S.
She looks adorable in her cone collar too ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 아기 강아지 중성화전 미리 적응시킬려구 넥카라 보구있었는데 체험단에 당첨되어서 받아봤어용〰️🤎 일단! 디자인이 너무너무 이뻐욤 그리구 1키로 조금 넘은 강아지한테도 무겁지 않아서 넥카라하고 잘 돌아댕기구 잘 뛰어댕교요‼️길이 조절 끈이 있아서 딱 쪼아서 사용해주면 벗겨질 걱정도 안해도 될것같아요🤍
reviews.content_en: I was looking at cone collars to help my puppy get used to wearing one before her spaying surgery, and I won a tester spot so I got to try it out〰️🤎 First of all! The design is SO pretty! And even for my pup who's just over 1kg, it's not heavy at all, so she runs and jumps around well with it on!‼️ Since there's an adjustable length strap, if I fit it snugly there's no worry about it slipping off🤍

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 치과 진료후 원래는 플라스틱 넥카라를 사용해야하는데 강아지가 전혀 간지러워하질 않고 플라스틱을 너무 싫어해서 급하게 구매했는데 너무 예뻐고 가벼워서 잘 착용하고 있어요. 3.4kg 말티즈 좀 큰 듯도 하지만 용도에는 잘 맞아요
reviews.content_en: After a dental visit, I normally would need to use a plastic cone collar, but my dog doesn't feel itchy at all and absolutely hates plastic, so I rushed to buy this instead—and it's so pretty and lightweight that she wears it well. It seems a bit big for my 3.4kg Maltese, but it works great for what I need it for.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 거의 만성 귓병으로 늘 넥카라를 달고 삽니다.. 아주 심해지면 플라스틱 넥카라를 쓰는데 너무 불편해보여서 이 폭신한 넥카라가 너무 편해보이네요 ~ 베개같이 베고 있기도 하고 생각보디 무갑지도 않고 무엇보다 예쁘네요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup has chronic ear infections and is basically always wearing a cone... When it gets really bad, we use a plastic cone which looks so uncomfortable, so this soft cone seems so much better~ 😊 She even rests her head on it like a pillow, it's lighter than I expected, and most importantly, it looks so cute! ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content:
우리집 강쥐 360일은 넥카라 차는데요..그동안 아르르만 쓰다가 이거 출시되고 베이지 구매해서 착용하다가 블루 또 구매했어요
가볍고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My pup wears a cone 360 days of the year.. We used ARROR before, but when this came out I bought it in beige and then got the blue one too. It's light and great!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이름 그대로 구름처렁  폭신폭닥 부드러워요
번혀불편해하지않고 베고 자기도해요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's exactly like the name says—fluffy and cloud-like, so soft 🌥️ She doesn't find it uncomfortable at all and even naps while wearing it ㅋ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 넘 예쁜데 밝은 색이라서 오염이 쉽게 되네요 ㅠㅠ 그래도 넘 귀엽고 예뻐용
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty, but since it's a light color it stains easily 😭 Still, it's so adorable and cute!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 자꾸 긁길래 기존에 쓰던게 좀 짧은 느낌이라 요건 길어보이길래 샀어요 기존것도 가벼웠고 사이즈도 라지라 그런가 무게가 가볍다는건 못느끼겠어요 더운데 안싫어하고 잘쓰고 있으면 좋겠네요
reviews.content_en: She kept scratching, so I thought the one we had before seemed a bit short, and this one looked longer so I got it. The old one was light too, and since the size is large, I can't really tell if the weight is lighter. I hope it stays comfortable in this hot weather and she continues to use it well! 🤞

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 몸무게 2.2kg 목둘레 16cm 다리길이 15cm
reviews.content_en: Weight 2.2kg, neck circumference 16cm, leg length 15cm
